reference: My thirteen-year-old son noticed a small, ball-like lump behind his nipple a week or so ago and noticed tonight that it has gotten larger. I am calling our doctor on Monday, but neither he nor I are able to sleep because of it. Are there less scary things that could be going on other than cancer?
text: My 13-year-old son noticed a small ball-like lump behind his nipple a week or so ago, and noticed tonight that it has gotten larger. I am calling our doctor on Monday, but neither he nor I are able to sleep because of it. Are there less scary things that could be going on other than cancer?
